title: pyrus euaria
intro: Pyrus euaria, also known as the Japanese rowan, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to East Asia. The medicinal properties of Pyrus euaria lie in its bark, which contains flavonoids and other compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Pyrus euaria is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to support overall well-being and promote healthy aging.
